name: Holding Arms
name_jp: ホールディング・アームズ
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; while this card is face-up on the field, that face-up monster cannot attack, also its effects are negated. While that face-up monster is on the field, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; while this card is face-up on the field, that face-up monster cannot attack, also its effects are negated. While that face-up monster is on the field, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; while this card is face-up on the field, that face-up monster cannot attack, also its effects are negated. While that face-up monster is on the field, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.

jp_sets.set: Duel Royale Deck Set EX Round 2

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
